mapper.sql: select id, inspected_unit_id, inspected_unit, inspection_time, score, rectification_time, current_state, question, charge_people_id, charge_people, corrective_action, picture_proof, document_proof, create_time, create_user_id, create_user, update_time,cao_zuo_type,reason_return,parent_id,unit_check_id,paixu_value,wenjianname ,unit_check_name, inspection_type, inspection_site from bdgl_special
mapper.insert:
insert into bdgl_special
id, inspected_unit_id, inspected_unit, inspection_time, score, rectification_time, current_state, question, charge_people_id, charge_people, corrective_action, picture_proof, document_proof, create_time, create_user_id, create_user, update_time, reason_return, cao_zuo_type, parent_id, unit_check_id, paixu_value, wenjianname, unit_check_name, inspection_type, inspection_site,
#{id}, #{inspectedUnitId}, #{inspectedUnit}, #{inspectionTime}, #{score}, #{rectificationTime}, #{currentState}, #{question}, #{chargePeopleId}, #{chargePeople}, #{correctiveAction}, #{pictureProof}, #{documentProof}, #{createTime}, #{createUserId}, #{createUser}, #{updateTime}, #{reasonReturn}, #{caoZuoType}, #{parentId}, #{unitCheckId}, #{paixuValue}, #{wenjianname}, #{unitCheckName}, #{inspectionType}, #{inspectionSite},
mapper.select: where 1=1 and cao_zuo_type='0' and YEAR(inspection_time) = YEAR(NOW()) and (inspected_unit_id = #{deptId} or parent_id = #{deptId})
mapper.delete:
delete from bdgl_special where id in
#{id}
